title: Required Device Unavailable Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action depends on a required device, but the device becomes unavailable before execution.
initial_state: The action was authorized assuming the required device would be available.
state_transition: The required device becomes unavailable before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required device availability.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required device resource is unavailable.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when a required device is unavailable.
